hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path" <<< "$(cat)"); case "$FILE" in */gen/*|*/db/generated/*) exit 0;; esac; cd /home/toyama-ryosuke/ghq/github.com/nangashi/bmkr; case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) oxfmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; oxlint --config oxlint.json "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -20;; *.go) DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); while [ "$DIR" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$DIR/go.mod" ]; do DIR=$(dirname "$DIR"); done; if [ -f "$DIR/go.mod" ]; then REL=$(realpath --relative-to="$DIR" "$FILE"); cd "$DIR" && golangci-lint fmt "./$REL" 2>/dev/null; golangci-lint run "./$REL" 2>&1 | tail -20; fi;; esac'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path" <<< "$(cat)"); PROTECTED="oxlint.json .golangci.yml"; for p in $PROTECTED; do case "$FILE" in *"$p") echo "BLOCKED: $FILE is a protected config file. Fix the code, not the linter/formatter config." >&2; exit 2;; esac; done'

bash -c 'FLAG=/tmp/claude-stop-hook-failed-bmkr; if [ -f "$FLAG" ]; then rm -f "$FLAG"; echo "[Stop Hook] Skipping lint (already failed once). Please fix and run just lint manually." >&2; exit 0; fi; cd /home/toyama-ryosuke/ghq/github.com/nangashi/bmkr && OUTPUT=$(just lint 2>&1); EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then touch "$FLAG"; echo "$OUTPUT" | tail -30; echo "\n[Stop Hook] Lint failed. Fix the issues before completing." >&2; exit 1; fi; rm -f "$FLAG"; echo "[Stop Hook] All lint checks passed."; exit 0'
